data: A4 Reusable Plastic Snap Closure File Folders with Pocket
Our durable A4 plastic file folder with a pocket offer secure and organized storage for your papers. Rush service is available.

Crafted from premium, thickened PP (polypropylene) material, these file folders are designed for durability and long-lasting use. The plastic construction ensures that your documents are protected from daily wear and tear, while the material's natural resistance to water provides an added layer of security. These file folders feature a convenient snap closure, ensuring that your documents are securely held in place. The transparent design allows for easy visibility of the contents, making it simple to locate and retrieve your files quickly. Additionally, the external label pocket provides extra storage space for business cards, or other small items. They are suitable for use by students, teachers, office workers who needs a reliable way to keep their paperwork organized.

These A4 reusable plastic file folders are made of premium, thickened PP material for durability. Their snap closure secures documents, and the transparent design enables easy visibility. The water - resistant material protects against wear. An external label pocket offers extra storage for small items. Ideal for students, teachers, and office workers, they provide secure and organized paper storage. Rush service available.
